mapper.sql: w.id, w.order_no, w.enterprise_id, w.title, w.content, w.contact_person, w.contact_phone, w.remark, w.type, w.status, w.accept_time, w.finish_time, w.handler_id, w.comment_text, w.score, w.images, w.create_time, w.update_time, w.is_deleted
mapper.insert: insert into biz_work_order ( order_no, enterprise_id, title, content, contact_person, contact_phone, type, status, images, create_time, update_time, is_deleted ) values ( #{orderNo}, #{enterpriseId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{contactPerson}, #{contactPhone}, #{type}, #{status}, #{images}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.select: select , e.company_name, u.real_name as handler_name from biz_work_order w left join biz_enterprise e on w.enterprise_id = e.id left join sys_user u on w.handler_id = u.id where w.id = #{id} AND w.is_deleted = 0
